description: SQL injection via string concatenation in doGet; safe PreparedStatement in doPost

expected.notes: AST pattern detects string concatenation inside executeQuery argument
request.getParameter("id") concatenated into SQL query string passed to executeQuery
source at 10:9 (request.getParameter("id")) flows through tainted SQL query (line 12) into result set output at out.println(rs.getString("name")); second-order taint via query results
